# WNBA Card Collector — Session Progress Log
# Updated by Claude at the end of every session. Do not edit manually mid-session.
# Format: newest session at the top.

---

## Session: April 17, 2026 — Progress Note Update

### Completed This Session
- Reviewed current repository scaffold and confirmed Phase 1 baseline is present.
- Verified `app/scan/page.tsx` already contains the Phase 2 scan workflow placeholder.
- Updated `claude-progress.txt` to reflect the latest session note.

### Phase Checklist Updates
- [x] Phase 1 complete
- [ ] Phase 2 scaffold present
- [ ] Phase 2 implementation not started

### Decisions Made
- Retained Phase 1 completion status; no new feature work was applied.
- Marked current file update as a progress note only.

### In-Flight / Partially Done
- None

### Blockers / Open Questions
- None

### Next Session: Start Here
- Begin Phase 2 implementation for Claude Vision scan workflow.
- Add camera/upload UI and card confirmation screen.
- Build Stage 1 and Stage 2 identification pipeline.

---

## Session: April 17, 2026 — Phase 1 · Iconography Update

### Completed This Session
- Installed @phosphor-icons/react package
- Updated BottomNav component to use Phosphor icons (Basketball, Camera, Star, Target, ShoppingCart) instead of emoji
- Fixed tsconfig.json ignoreDeprecations setting from "6.0" to "5.0"
- Updated styling-guidelines.md to specify @phosphor-icons/react as the icon library
- Validated TypeScript compilation and committed all changes
- Pushed changes to GitHub repository

### Phase Checklist Updates
- [x] Next.js scaffold with App Router and TypeScript
- [x] Supabase integration with dedicated schema and RLS policies
- [x] Google OAuth authentication flow
- [x] Mobile-first responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- [x] Bottom navigation with standardized Phosphor icons
- [x] Auth guards on protected routes
- [x] Database schema with integrity constraints
- [x] Code review fixes for security and UX issues
- [x] GitHub repository setup and documentation
- [x] Environment template and build validation

### Decisions Made
- Standardized on Phosphor icons over emoji for better accessibility and consistency
- Fixed tsconfig.json ignoreDeprecations to use correct string value "5.0"

### In-Flight / Partially Done
- None - Phase 1 fully completed

### Blockers / Open Questions
- None - ready for Phase 2

### Next Session: Start Here
- Begin Phase 2: Implement AI-powered card scanning with Claude Vision API
- Create /scan route with camera integration
- Set up Claude Vision API integration for card identification
- Design card data models and scanning workflow

### Key Files Touched
- src/components/BottomNav.tsx (updated to use Phosphor icons)
- tsconfig.json (fixed ignoreDeprecations setting)
- styling-guidelines.md (updated icon library specification)
- package.json (added @phosphor-icons/react dependency)
- claude-progress.txt (this file)
